title: Better fps than vanilla and optifine
description: Boost your fps without compromising mod compatibility
body:
This modpack increases your fps without comprising mod compatibility.






<details>
<summary>Any Issues/Problems or Suggestions for the modpack </summary>

[https://discord.gg/6e475T68ce](https://discord.gg/6e475T68ce)
Feel free to say any comments about the modpack on the discord server in the mod suggestions forum
</details>

- Sodium,
- Athena,
- Capes,
- Cloth config,
- Fabric api,

<details>
<summary>Resourcepacks</summary>

- Translations for Sodium,
- No Z-Fighting,
- Chat Reporting Helper,
- CTM Optifine-Fabric,
~~- Fast Better Grass~~
</details>

<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>
 
- Will there be a Quilt version?No
- Any backports?Not below 1.20.1
- Any snapshot versions?No
- How often will this be updated? At Minimum once or twice a month.
- Will there be a Neoforge version?Not offically however if anyone ports it to Neoforge feel free but provided credit is given back as the modpack is under Apache2.0.


</details>

I Would recommend allocating 2gb(2048mb) of ram at minimum.
